betterquesting:10.desc:8: §o"I continue to encounter more cultists. I should hunt as many down as I can because their reckless use of Eldritch Thaumaturgy can be nothing but dangerous. Perhaps I'll even find something useful from them."

§o"It seems whereever I encounter the cultists, they're often accompanied by these Crimson Knights. They are very talented combatants and can be deadly if allowed too close. I will have to kill them as well to stop the Crimson Cult from continuing to invade this world."
No Description

§o"There is magic in this world that can be harnessed. I just need to find a way to get started. Maybe there's a way to break down these Essence Crystals to a more reactive form. I should try what I saw in my dream and grind them into a dust along with some redstone. For this, I'll need to combine three crystals, a redstone dust, a piece of flint, and a bowl"

§o§o§r"§"§oI need a place to work and craft items. Perhaps I should built myself a workbench!"

§o§o§o§rGather some wooden logs by punching a tree, craft them into planks, and combine §n§rfour into a crafting table.

§n§n§§§o"I could use§r §osome tools to make my tasks easier."

§rCraft a pickaxe, shovel, and hatchet out of stone.

§o"I wish I could cook my food and melt metals in the same place."

§rCraft a furnace.

§o"These stone tools are just not getting the job done anymore."

§rCraft a set of iron tools.

§o"This iron equipment is great! But, it just breaks too quickly. I need an upgrade..."

§rCraft a set of the Diamond Tools.

§o"Its getting too dark to see. I'll be able to see if I make a torch or two."

§rUse charcoal or coal to craft some torches.

§o"The more I go out at night and into caves, the more dangerous it gets. I need to protect myself."

§r§a§rCraft an iron chestplate.

§r§o"Living in the wild is spooky. I need somewhere to keep myself and my items safe."

§rWhether you're an amateur building the Taj Mahal or an expert architect building a dirt hut, build a home or take shelter from the elements. 

Click the box once you've gotten a shelter.
No Description
No Description

§o"In my dream I saw a book of arcane knowledge that should help guide me to further discovering the mysteries of magic. If I sprinkle some of the Salis Mundus I've created on a book shelf, I should be able to obtain this book."

§r§9§rCreate a Thaumonomicon.

§a§2Don't forget to consult your Thaumonomicon in addition to the quests for information about Thaumaturgy.

§o"My newly created Thaumonomicon describes a new type of crafting table that I will need to create many of the magically infused items that a Thaumaturge will need. I should use some of the Salis Mundus I've created to convert a normal crafting table into an arcane crafting table."
§o"I've discovered some mysterious crystals that seem to hold some kind of energy. I should study these to see if I can find some way to harness they power they contain."

§o"Now that I have a Thaumonicon and a Research Table, I need a way to study objects in the world to find out more about their thaumic aspects. This may also help reveal more knowledge in the book, as it seems to reveal more to me as I learn about Thaumaturgy. For this task, I will create a tool known as a Thaumometer."

§rIn addition to scanning by holding the Thaumometer and right clicking, you can hover over other items in your inventory with it to scan them, and scan yourself by hovering over your player image in the inventory. You can also scan a chest to scan all of its contents at once.

§o"Now that I've armor and a decent weapon, I need to show these mobs who the boss is!"

§T§rTake the lives of ten creepers, zombles, skeletons, and spiders to show your true grit.

§o"I've studied the basics of what Thaumaturgy refers to as Artifice. Using this knowledge I can create new tools to help my research and exploration. First I should make some goggles that will show me some of the same information as my Thaumometer without needing to be held. I should remember though, that these goggles will not allow me to scan things for new knowledge."

§o§rCraft Goggles of Revealing on the Arcane Workbench.

§o"I have begun study into what is known as Auramancy, which is manipulating the vis in the environment to create spell-like effects. To do this, I will need to build a table that is capable of creating a Focus. This Focus when imbued with the correct attributes will allow me to create a variety of magical effects. I'll need to research Auramancy further in my Thaumonicon to learn these Focus attributes."

§o"My studies into Thaumaturgy has lead to a new technique called Infusion. Using a set of altars and a Runix Matrix, I can infuse an item with essentia and other ingredients to create unique tools and objects. To get started I will need to assemble the altars and the Runix Matrix. These will need to be set up with some Arcane Stone and activated with Salis Mundus to create the Infusion Altar. My Thaumonicon will have detailed instructions for how to do this."

§o"To begin creating golems, I'll need to create a Golem Press. I've drawn up some plans to allow me to create this structure. Once I've assembled and placed the required blocks, sprinking it with some Salis Mundus should transform them into what I need."

§o"To get started with Alchemy, I'll need to create a Crucible. My Thaumonicon shows a simple way to create one. First I must acquire a Cauldron. Then I'll just need to sprinkle some Salis Mundus on the Cauldron and it should transform."

§rCheck the box once you've made your Crucible to complete this quest.

§o"I need a place to perform my research into Thaumaturgy. Luckily my Thaumonicon details a way to create a table perfectly suited to this task. I should also be able to increase the productivity of my research if I place blocks related to my research nearby. A bookshelf would also be a usefult thing to have near."

§o"Normal lights work well enough, but I've now come up with a magical solution for lighting. One of these lamp once placed will create additional light sources in nearby locations if they are dark. These will disappear gradually if the lamp is broken."
§o"I've come up with plans for a chest that can collect any items that fall on top of it without hoppers or other means to insert items. I'm sure I can find some uses for this."
§o"In my research I have discovered the means to create mechanisms that work off of ambient magical energy. I should construct a few of these to see what I can do with them."

§o"Drawing on the darker powers of the Nether, I've found a way to smelt my ores using Thaumaturgy! This furnace will require no fuel and will even produce a bit of extra material in the forms of nuggets and rare earths. The plans for this constuct are in my Thaumonomicon."

§rFor this quest to complete, right click any corner of the Infernal Furnace with an empty hand once it's complete.
§o"I have come up with a way to monitor the local Vis. I should create the Thaumic Dioptra to make sure I don't overly deplete the local vis or create too much flux."

§o§o"I have discovered a way to make a Thaumaturge's equivalent of a grappling hook. This tool will quickly pull me towards any block it connects to. Unlike a grappling hook, it will not allow me to hang from the block it touches."

§o"By infusing glowstone with the essences of fire, light, and energy I can create a light source that won't be washed away by water. It can also be dyed to give it any color I wish. Better yet, this substance can act as a heat source for my crucible with the unnecessary dangers of having fire or lava beneath it. I'm sure I will discover other uses for it as well."

§rCreate Nitor in a Crucible or Thaumatorium.
No Description

§o"I've learned how to infuse zombie flesh with the essence of fire to create a magic tallow for the making of candles. They will make excellent decoration for my research area."

§rCreate Magic Tallow in a Crucible or Thaumatorium. Then use the tallow to craft White Tallow Candles in the Arcane Workbench.

These candles can also be used as stabilizers for Infusion Altars.

§o"In my research, I've discovered a way to infuse coal with magical energies to make an even more powerful fuel. This is creates a fuel source that's four times better than regular coal. It can also be used as an improvised grenade."
§r
No Description
No Description
No Description
§o"I have invented a device that will allow a person or object to be levitated using ambient vis. This will make moving between floors much faster."
No Description
No Description
No Description
No Description
No Description

§o"I've encountered a cultist of what I think is called the Crimson Cult. They seem to be deeply involved in Eldritch Thaumaturgy. I'll need to keep an eye out for them. There's no telling what they're up to."
§o"The Crimson Cult appears to show up from these portals, but I know not from where. This portal must be destroyed to stop them all from coming through."
No Description
No Description
No Description
No Description
Quest for locking quests in a tree during quest building. Checking the quest will allow the other quests to be accessed/tested. Add as a requirement to any quest to lock it.
No Description
No Description
No Description
No Description
No Description
No Description
No Description

§o"While making my Diamond Chestplate, I came across a Diamond Sword that appeared from nowhere. It's chipped and damaged, but I can feel some kind of energy in it waiting to be released. Maybe if I use it in battle, that may bring the magic in this weapon back to life."

§U§rUsing the Hero's Trial, attack and kill at least 10 zombies.

§o"I can create a small object to focus vis into magical effects using my alchemical knowledge. This first attempt is able to hold only basic combinations of effects. I'll need to eventually create a better way to focus the vis."
§o"My research has yielded a way to recharge my items that use vis more quickly. It will pull vis from the local area and add it to the item on the pedestal."

§o"Combining Alchemy with Infusion, I'm now able to make a better focus for casting. This will take one of the basic foci and infuse it with materials."
§r§6
Make sure to scan your Pech Wand before using it to unlock new research in your Thaumonicon.
§o"By further infusing my advanced focus with more exotic materials I can create a greater focus. This will enable me to create much more complex combinations of casting effects."
§o"In order to focus the vis in the aura into spelss, I'll first need a glove of some form to hold the arcaane focus."

§o"Auramancy has given me insight into the manipulation of vis to a point that I can now use it to make my arcane crafting more efficient. I have designed a device that when added to my arcane crafting table will use vis from a larger area."

§rThe Workbench Charger will allow the arcane crafting table to use vis from the current chunk and the 8 adjacent chunks.

§o"Certain crops won't grow well when it gets too cold. If I want to be able to grow in any season, I should build something to keep them warm. Greenhouse glass should be perfect for creating the perfect environment for my plants."

§r§a§rCraft Greenhouse Glass.

For the greenhouse glass to work, it only needs to be placed above the crop being grown with a clear view of the sky. Any other materials can be used for walls, etc, to build a greenhouse of your own aesthetics.

§o"I've learned of a source of highly concentrated energy called Ember. Unfortunately it's buried in the bedrock where my tools can't reach, but the Ancient Codex mentions a device for extracting this material from the Bedrock; The Ember Bore. I'll need to craft an Ember Bore and place it near the Bedrock so it can gather some crystallized Ember."

§o§rCraft an Ember Bore and place it near bedrock. It can be placed directly on it, or a couple of blocks above it for aesthitics since it has a spinning blade beneath.
This block has no interface: fuel must be fed in using a hopper or item pipe. To better connect with the machine, use a Machine Accessor since it will give you more block faces to attach things like hoppers or item extractors.

§o"Mining with a pickaxe is great for picking out the precise blocks I want to mine. To really clear some ground I'll need something a little heavier..."

§rCraft a Stone Mining Hammer.

§o"Now that I have found many ways of using and manipulating vis, my next concern was storing it. I have discovered a way to store small amounts of vis. Each battery will hold 10 vis that will charge when the aura is near it's maximum fullness and will release it when that level drops to less than 75%"
No Description
No Description

§o"By infusing an ordinary pair of leather boots, I am able to make some boots that will help with my exploration. These aren't as armored as other footwear I could make, but they do seem to make me run faster and move across changes in elevation much easier."
No Description
§o"By infusing tools made from thaumium with elemental energy, I've created upgraded tools with unique properties. I imagine these will also be exceptionally enchantable."
No Description
No Description
No Description

§o"I have designed a ring infused with the essence of air that will allow me to jump when already in the air. The could prove very helpful with getting over obstacles or working through the difficult terrain of the caverns below."
§o"Research is such a time consuming process. To help in that end, I've come up with a headband that will absorb some dropped xp and convert that into progress towards research."

§o"I need better ways to defend myself than just using magic and weapons. This is what has lead to my newest creation: Thaumium Fortress Armor. This armor will increase it's defensive capability as more pieces of it are worn. It is made of Thaumium that has been infused with the essence of armor and other special ingredients. With proper research, there should be ways to make it even more effective."

§o"My Thaumonicon shows a way to infuse many armors and accessories with a defensive barrier called Runic Shielding. My initial research shows that I should be able to easily infuse a ring with this energy. I'm certain that I should be able to replicate the process on many other items."

§r§cCompleting this quest will consume the Runic Shield infused Mundane Ring in place of one of the reward items. This will require a Mundane Ring with no Qualities.

§o"By studying mundane projectiles, I have learned a way to project vis in a similar manner."§r

§6This quest will allow you to complete Focus Medium - Projectile without needing to be hit by the various projectile types in the normal research. Llamas will not spit making this research impossible to complete in normal circumstances.

0:10.command:8:
#Execute /thaumcraft research to add Focus Projectile to player
tc research @s FOCUSPROJECTILE
0:10.description:8: A command will run to complete 'Focus Medium - Projectile'

betterquesting:10.desc:8: §o"Using a simple arcane mechanism and other arcane materials, I can create a Clockwork Mind to provide basic intelligence for my golems. I will need to find ways to improve on this to make my golems capable of more complex instructions."

§o"By infusing my original Clockwork Mind with a Zombie Brain and a Complex Arcane Mechanism, I can create the Biothaumic Mind. This golem brain will make my golems able to process more complicated instructions.

§o"Now that I can create golems and give them some level of awareness, I will need to give them tasks. I've discovered a way to command the golems using Control Seals. I will also need a Golemancer's Bell to modify the tasks provided by the Control Seals."

§o"During my research into Golemancy, I have discovered some forbidden knowledge. I can reanimate a zombie brain using Thaumaturgy. This brain will be able to gather dropped experience orbs and may also be useful near my Research Table to aid in my efforts there."

§r§6Researching and creating the Brain in a Jar will give some warp.

§o"In my travels I've seen many ancient looking structures that are inhabited by strange golems. These are much different than the ones I find in villages and must be animated by another means. Perhaps if I can gather materials from one I can try to learn more about the ancient technology that created them."

§9§aRefer to the Ancient Codex for additional info as you progress through Embers. You can right click the nodes in the book to mark them complete and view the next entry.

§o"I should create a golem to see if my research has proven fruitful."

§rCreate any golem to complete this quest.

§6§c§e§6§4§e§6Thaumaturgy can be dangerous if delved into too deeply and will begin to affect your sanity. Be cautious as you progress to not gain warp too quickly or you will begin to experience some side effects. There will be some thaumic knowledge that will require you to gain warp to attain. Manage your warp carefully unless you want to suffer its side effects.

§rCheck the box to acknowledge that you're aware of the dangers of the Warp and also to receive one free Sanitizing Soap (which when used will remove some of your non-permanent warp).

§o"To further study the golems I can do something unthinkable: carve one of my creations up to see just how it works. Perhaps I can find something useful, though I'm sure to suffer some mental harm in the process."

§rAs with the previous quest, any golem will work for this quest.

§4§c§cThis quest will give warp each time it's completed. This will also destroy one golem in your inventory. Be sure to only have one that you want to sacrifice.

§o"I have mastered the basics of golem control!"

§rMake one of each of the first tier Control Seals.

§o"I have become an expert in Golemancy, although there still may more secrets to be learned about Golemancy."

§rObtain at least 1 of each of the second tier Control Seals.
No Description

§o"I seem to have drawn the attention of some higher members of the Crimson Cult. I expect this fight to be much more difficult than what I've experienced with the normal cultists."

§4§c§l§r§cDo not complete this quest until you are prepared to fight the Crimson Praetor.§l§r§c Claiming the quest reward for this quests will spawn the Crimson Praetor so that he can be battled.
betterquesting:10.name:8: A Leader of the Crimson Cult

betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§o"I have defeated one of the Crimson Cult's praetors, and now I am certainly marked as a great threat. However, now I am in possession of his equipment and some relics that will make my understanding of the darker forms of Thaumaturgy much easier to complete.
§r
It's only a matter of time before they send something much, much worse... and I'll be ready when they do."
No Description

§o"I've caused major damage to the ranks of the Crimson Cult. Whatever their goals, I have set them back. They shouldn't pose a large threat to me any longer. I've also managed to gather a substantial amount of knowledge about the Eldritch during my encounters with them. Only time will tell what I will do with this..."

§o"I'm now one of the greatest threats to the Crimson Cult and I expect that they'll soon send some of their most powerful forces. I should be prepared. What shows up next will likely be very deadly."
§c
Do not complete this quest until you are prepared to fight the Greater Crimson Portal. Claiming the quest reward for this quests will spawn the Greater Crimson Portal so that it can be battled.
No Description
No Description
No Description
No Description

§o"Sometimes I need things crushed and ground more finely than I can do by hand. Fortunately I know just the tool for the job."

§rCraft a Quern and a Hand Crank. 

To use the quern, attach the hand crank to the top. Then you'll need to feed items into it using a hopper or Embers item pipes. 
Right click and hold on the crank to turn the quern and grind the items fed to it.

The quern can also be used to ground down ores into multiple ore dusts, but this requires more power than the hand crank can produce. You'll need to find another way to spin the quern to grind ores...

§o"The further North and South I travel, the more extreme the temperatures will become. To handle this and changes in seasons, I should add some liners to my armor to help handle the heat or cold."§r

§a§rCraft a Chestplate Cool Liner or Chestplate Warm Liner.

§o"Iron Armor works well, but some of the enemies in this world deal damage even beyond what my Iron Armor can handle. If I create some armor from diamond, I should be even harder to hurt. Then I'll really be ready to take the fight to the monsters!"
§r

§o"As I keep collecting coins, it'll be nice to have somewhere to spend them. I've heard rumors of a mysterious trader who will show up simply by creating a red-carpet-topped market stall for him to work from. Here I should be able to trade my coins for useful items."

§r§a§fCraft and place a Market if you don't have one. Then right click it to complete the quest.
No Description
Basic Survival Skills
Mod Progression Questline: Astral Sorcery
Mod Progression Questline: Thaumcraft
No Description
Exploration Questline
Mod Progression Questline: Embers
Story Questline
